language.failed: No se pudo guardar la preferencia de idioma.

home.heroText: Fortalece tu fe mediante recordatorios, conferencias y conocimiento islámico beneficioso.

remember.title: Remember Allah
remember.text: Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.
remember.reason: Regular remembrance keeps the heart calm, strengthens trust in Allah, and helps you respond with wisdom during stress.

salah.title: Protect Your Salah
salah.text: Prayer is your daily connection with Allah.
salah.reason: Salah builds discipline, keeps your day anchored around worship, and protects you from drifting into harmful habits.

gratitude.title: Practice Gratitude
gratitude.text: Thank Allah for every blessing, big or small.
gratitude.reason: Gratitude shifts focus from what is missing to what Allah has provided, which increases contentment and spiritual strength.

charity.title: Give Charity
charity.text: Every act of kindness is rewarded.
charity.reason: Charity purifies wealth, supports people in need, and grows mercy in your heart while earning reward from Allah.

patience.title: Have Patience
patience.text: Allah is with those who are patient.
patience.reason: Patience helps you stay principled through tests, avoid regretful reactions, and remain hopeful in Allah's plan.

quran.title: Read the Qur'an
quran.text: Spend a few minutes reading and reflecting today.
quran.reason: Reading Qur'an gives guidance, heals spiritual emptiness, and keeps your decisions aligned with truth and purpose.

live.title: Join beneficial broadcasts in real time

scholars.title: Learn from trusted scholars and educators

auth.joinCommunity: Join the Marakah community in minutes.
auth.mobileFlow: On phone, sign in with fingerprint or facial recognition, or use username and password.

auth.biometricFailed: Biometric sign-in was cancelled or failed. Please try again.
auth.mobileInstruction: On phone, sign in with fingerprint or facial recognition, or use username and password.

status.noResults: No masjids found for that search.
status.locationUnavailable: Location is unavailable: your browser does not support geolocation.
status.locationDenied: Location permission denied. Allow location access in browser settings or search by city, state, or ZIP.
status.locationUnknown: Location unavailable right now. Check your device location services and try again.
status.locationTimeout: Location request timed out. Please try again or search by city, state, or ZIP.
status.locationFailed: Could not determine your location. Search by city, state, or ZIP instead.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Track your progress, stay consistent, and keep everything important in one place.

empty.activities: No lectures or events saved yet. Add one to begin building your journey.
empty.photos: No photos saved yet. Add a photo, screenshot, or memory from your device.
empty.reminders: No favorite reminders saved yet. Save a reminder that you would like to revisit.
empty.lectures: No lectures or events saved yet. Add one to begin building your journey.
empty.events: No saved events yet. Save events from the Events page to see them here.

validation.unsupportedImageType: This image type is not supported. Use JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF, or HEIC.
validation.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum allowed size is 5 MB.
validation.chooseImage: Please choose an image before saving.

identity.title: Etnia, Herencia o Apoyo
identity.description: Opcionalmente elige una Bandera de Perfil basada en herencia o apoyo. Marakah solo aplica lo que selecciones manualmente.
identity.supportOnlyDescription: El Apoyo Palestino muestra la bandera de Palestina como fondo opcional de apoyo.
identity.previewEmpty: No hay Bandera de Perfil seleccionada.
identity.previewAria: Vista previa de la bandera del perfil: {{flags}}
identity.previewOrder: {{left}} a la izquierda y {{right}} a la derecha.

messages.saved: Selección de Bandera de Perfil guardada.
messages.cancelled: Se cancelaron los cambios no guardados.
messages.removed: Se eliminó la selección de Bandera de Perfil.

details.bioPlaceholder: Add a short bio to introduce your learning journey.

admin.masjidTitle: Dashboard overview for your local masjid

seo.homeTitle: Marakah | Aprendizaje islámico, recordatorios y comunidad
seo.homeDescription: Descubre recordatorios islámicos, sesiones en vivo, mezquitas cercanas, eruditos y eventos comunitarios con Marakah.
seo.liveDescription: Únete a sesiones islámicas en vivo y círculos de Corán en Marakah.
seo.recordingsDescription: Explora grabaciones de khutbah y conferencias islámicas a tu ritmo.
seo.masjidsDescription: Busca mezquitas cercanas reales y consulta horarios de oración y eventos.
seo.scholarsDescription: Aprende de eruditos y educadores islámicos de confianza.
seo.eventsDescription: Explora próximos halaqahs, noches juveniles y eventos comunitarios.
seo.feedDescription: Mantente conectado con actualizaciones beneficiosas de la comunidad de Marakah.
seo.profileDescription: Haz seguimiento de tu progreso islámico, recordatorios y actividad personal.
seo.loginDescription: Inicia sesión de forma segura para continuar tu aprendizaje islámico.
seo.signupDescription: Crea tu cuenta de Marakah y únete a una comunidad de crecimiento islámico.
seo.platformAdminDescription: Herramientas de administración de la plataforma Marakah.
seo.masjidDashboardDescription: Panel administrativo de mezquita para asistencia, clases y voluntariado.
